prestazioni: AMG M159 6.2L V8 NA engine (197.008) with a custom Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ supercharger kit featuring a Magnuson TVS2300 blower (12 psi boost), forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft), and a custom Weistec ported cylinder head with oversized titanium intake valves and sodium-filled exhaust valves for sustained high-RPM operation (9,000+ RPM redline).

Full titanium Akrapović Evolution Line exhaust system with 3.5-inch diameter piping, quad 100mm carbon-fiber tips, and a secondary bypass valve for on-demand backpressure reduction, paired with a custom X-Pipe and secondary catalytic converter delete (track-only).

Öhlins TTX46 coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high/low-speed compression), custom valving for the C63 BS chassis, and adjustable camber plates (up to -4.5 degrees front, -3.8 degrees rear) for aggressive track alignment. Includes a full H&R Motorsport sway bar kit (25mm front, 22mm rear) with adjustable end links for fine-tuned roll stiffness.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the C63 Black Series, featuring carbon-fiber fenders (3.5-inch wider front, 4-inch wider rear), custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a ducktail spoiler with adjustable Gurney flap. Painted in Mercedes-Benz Designo Magno Alanite Grey with matte black accents.

BBS FI-R 19x10.5 ET25 (front) and 19x12 ET45 (rear) forged wheels with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 325/25/19 rear) for maximum mechanical grip. Custom center-lock adapters for rapid wheel changes during endurance events.

Custom carbon-fiber engine cover with a clear polycarbonate window to showcase the Weistec supercharger, paired with a full carbon-fiber interior package (dashboard, door cards, and Recaro Sportster CS seats in Alcantara with red stitching). Includes a custom roll cage by Matter Fab (TIG-welded chromoly, 6-point design) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360).
